top_signals.title: Iran in Talks With Oman Over Permanent Toll System for Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Iran is discussing with Oman how to set up some form of a permanent toll system that will formalize its control of maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Airbus, Air France Culpable for AF447 Crash, French Court Rules
top_signals.summary: Airbus SE and Air France were found guilty of involuntary manslaughter in the deadly crash of a passenger jet en route from Brazil to Paris 17 years ago after a French appeals court overturned a previous ruling.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
